---
title: "Portfolio Health Dashboard"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML

# Quarto may run kernel from this file's directory or the project root.
_candidates = [
    Path("data/health-dashboard.json"),
    Path("../data/health-dashboard.json"),
]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "data/health-dashboard.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report health-dashboard"
    )

d = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group    = d["group"]
pi       = d["pi"]
port     = d["portfolio"]
vs_rows  = d["vs_rows"]
blocked  = d["top_blocked"]
at_risk  = d["at_risk_epics"]
```

```{python}
# Header metadata
pi_label   = pi["current"] or "—"
pi_elapsed = f"{pi['pct_elapsed']}% elapsed" if pi["pct_elapsed"] else "Not started"
if pi["start"] and pi["end"]:
    pi_range = f"{pi['start']} – {pi['end']}"
else:
    pi_range = "—"

HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>
  <strong>Current PI:</strong> {pi_label} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>PI Period:</strong> {pi_range} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>PI Elapsed:</strong> {pi_elapsed}
</p>
""")
```

## Portfolio Summary

```{python}
tl = port["tl_schedule"]
rows = [
    ("Total Epics (all PIs)",       port["epics_total"]),
    ("Epics in Current PI",         port["pi_epics_count"]),
    (f"Current PI Progress {tl}",   f"{port['pct_done']}% done ({pi['pct_elapsed']}% elapsed)"),
    ("Blocked Epics (current PI)",  port["blocked_total"]),
    ("Epics with Active ROAM Risks", port["risk_epics"]),
    ("Unassigned to PI",            port["unassigned"]),
]
if port["capacity_str"] not in ("—", ""):
    rows.append(("Story Points (current PI)", port["capacity_str"]))

html = '<table class="table table-sm table-striped"><thead><tr><th>Metric</th><th>Value</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
for label, val in rows:
    html += f"<tr><td>{label}</td><td>{val}</td></tr>"
html += "</tbody></table>"
HTML(html)
```

## Value Stream Status

```{python}
if vs_rows:
    html = """
<table class="table table-sm table-bordered">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Value Stream</th><th>Status</th><th>Schedule</th>
      <th>Capacity</th><th>Risk</th><th>Blocking</th>
      <th>Epics</th><th>Unassigned</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
"""
    for row in vs_rows:
        vs = row["vs"]
        vs_link = f'<a href="{vs["web_url"]}" target="_blank">{vs["name"]}</a>'
        html += f"""
    <tr>
      <td>{vs_link}</td>
      <td>{row['overall']}</td>
      <td>{row['tl_sched']} {row['sched_detail']}</td>
      <td>{row['tl_cap']} {row['cap_detail']}</td>
      <td>{row['tl_risk']} {row['risk_detail']}</td>
      <td>{row['tl_block']} {row['block_detail']}</td>
      <td>{row['pi_epics']} in PI / {row['epics_total']} total</td>
      <td>{row['unassigned']}</td>
    </tr>"""
    html += "\n  </tbody>\n</table>"
else:
    html = "<p><em>No Value Stream groups found.</em></p>"
HTML(html)
```

## Needs Attention

### ⛔ Blocked Epics

```{python}
ICONS = {"Epic": "🏆", "Capability": "🧩", "Feature": "🛠️"}

if blocked:
    html = """
<table class="table table-sm">
  <thead><tr><th>Epic</th><th>Blockers</th><th>PI</th></tr></thead>
  <tbody>
"""
    for item in blocked:
        icon = ICONS.get(item["type"], "🏆")
        if item["url"]:
            link = f'<a href="{item["url"]}" target="_blank">{icon} {item["title"]}</a>'
        else:
            link = f'{icon} {item["title"]}'
        html += f"<tr><td>{link}</td><td>{item['n_blockers']}</td><td>{item['piid']}</td></tr>"
    html += "  </tbody>\n</table>"
else:
    html = "<p>✅ No blocked epics found.</p>"
HTML(html)
```

### 🟡 At-Risk Epics (behind schedule)

```{python}
if at_risk:
    html = """
<table class="table table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr><th>Epic</th><th>Done</th><th>PI Elapsed</th><th>Gap</th><th>Weight</th><th>PI</th></tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
"""
    for item in at_risk:
        icon = ICONS.get(item["type"], "🏆")
        if item["url"]:
            link = f'<a href="{item["url"]}" target="_blank">{icon} {item["title"]}</a>'
        else:
            link = f'{icon} {item["title"]}'
        html += (
            f"<tr><td>{link}</td><td>{item['pct_done']}%</td>"
            f"<td>{item['pct_elapsed']}%</td><td>{item['gap']}pp</td>"
            f"<td>{item['weight_str']}</td><td>{item['piid']}</td></tr>"
        )
    html += "  </tbody>\n</table>"
else:
    html = "<p>✅ No epics significantly behind schedule.</p>"
HTML(html)
```

---

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Legend

| Icon | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 🏆 | Epic |
| 🧩 | Capability |
| 🛠️ | Feature |
| 🟢 | On track — within threshold |
| 🟡 | Watch — approaching threshold |
| 🔴 | At risk — threshold exceeded |
| ⬜ | No data |

**Traffic Light Thresholds**

| Column | 🟢 On Track | 🟡 Watch | 🔴 At Risk |
|--------|------------|---------|-----------|
| Schedule | ≤ 10pp behind PI elapsed | ≤ 20pp behind | > 20pp behind |
| Capacity | 80–110% loaded | 70–120% | Outside 70–120% |
| Risk | No active ROAM risks | 1–2 active risks | 3+ active risks |
| Blocking | 0 blockers | 1–2 blockers | 3+ blockers |
:::
